an1.82:0.2: 9. The Chapter on Heedlessness and So Forth
an1.82:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — heedlessness.
an1.83:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — heedfulness.
an1.84:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — laziness.
an1.85:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — the arousal of energy.
an1.85:1.2: The arousal of energy, *bhikkhus*, leads to great benefit."
an1.86:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — having many wishes.
an1.86:1.2: Having many wishes, *bhikkhus*, leads to great harm."
an1.87:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — having few wishes.
an1.87:1.2: Having few wishes, *bhikkhus*, leads to great benefit."
an1.88:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — discontent.
an1.89:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — contentment.
an1.90:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — inappropriate attention [*ayonisomanasikāro*].
an1.90:1.2: Inappropriate attention [*ayonisomanasikāro*], *bhikkhus*, leads to great harm."
an1.91:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — appropriate attention [*yoniso manasikāro*].
an1.91:1.2: Appropriate attention [*yonisomanasikāro*], *bhikkhus*, leads to great benefit."
an1.92:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — lack of clear comprehension [*asampajaññaṁ*].
an1.92:1.2: Lack of clear comprehension [*asampajaññaṁ*], *bhikkhus*, leads to great harm."
an1.93:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — clear comprehension [*sampajaññaṁ*].
an1.93:1.2: Clear comprehension [*sampajaññaṁ*], *bhikkhus*, leads to great benefit."
an1.94:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — bad friendship.
an1.94:1.2: Bad friendship, *bhikkhus*, leads to great harm."
an1.95:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — good friendship.
an1.95:1.2: Good friendship, *bhikkhus*, leads to great benefit."
an1.96:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great harm as this — devotion to unwholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to wholesome *dhammas*.
an1.96:1.2: Devotion, *bhikkhus*, to unwholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to wholesome *dhammas* leads to great harm."
an1.97:1.1: "I see no other single thing, *bhikkhus*, that leads to such great benefit as this — devotion to wholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to unwholesome *dhammas*.
an1.97:1.2: Devotion, *bhikkhus*, to wholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to unwholesome *dhammas* leads to great benefit."
an1.97:1.4: The ninth chapter, on heedlessness and so forth.
